src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:        const projectTaskStats: Record<string, { total: number, completed: number }> = {};
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:        
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:        tasks.forEach((t: any) => {
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            if (!t.projectId) return;
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            if (!projectTaskStats[t.projectId]) {
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:                const project = projects.find(p => p.id === t.projectId);
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:                projectTaskStats[t.projectId] = { total: 0, completed: 0 };
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            }
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            projectTaskStats[t.projectId].total += 1;
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            if (t.status === 'Completed') {
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:                projectTaskStats[t.projectId].completed += 1;
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            }
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:        });
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:        return Object.keys(projectTaskStats).map(projectId => {
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            const project = projects.find(p => p.id === projectId);
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            const stats = projectTaskStats[projectId];
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            return {
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:                name: project ? project.companyName : 'Unknown', // Using companyName as project name based on previous context
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:                completed: stats.completed,
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:                remaining: stats.total - stats.completed
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:            };
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:        }).slice(0, 5); // Top 5
src/pages/project-management/ProjectReports.tsx:    }, [tasks, projects]);

src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:import {

src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:} from 'recharts';
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:export default function AccountingDashboard() {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const { theme } = useTheme();
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const isDark = theme === 'dark';
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const { formatCurrency } = useSettings();
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const { accounts, journalLines, journalEntries } = useAccounting();
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const { invoices } = useInvoice();
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const { expenses } = useExpense();
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const { payments } = usePayment();
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const stats = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const totalRevenue = accounts
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Revenue')
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.currentBalance, 0);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const totalExpenses = accounts
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Expense')
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.currentBalance, 0);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const netProfit = totalRevenue - totalExpenses;
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const cashBalance = accounts
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Asset' && (a.name.toLowerCase().includes('cash') || a.name.toLowerCase().includes('bank')))
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.currentBalance, 0);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const accountsReceivable = accounts
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Asset' && (a.name.toLowerCase().includes('receivable') || a.code.startsWith('1200')))
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.currentBalance, 0);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const accountsPayable = accounts
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Liability' && (a.name.toLowerCase().includes('payable') || a.code.startsWith('2100')))
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      .reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.currentBalance, 0);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    return {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      totalRevenue,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      totalExpenses,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      netProfit,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      cashBalance,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      accountsReceivable,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      accountsPayable
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    };
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  }, [accounts]);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const chartData = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    // Group by month for the last 6 months
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const months = [];
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    for (let i = 5; i >= 0; i--) {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      const d = new Date();
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      d.setMonth(d.getMonth() - i);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      months.push(d.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'short' }));
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    }
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const revenueVsExpenses = months.map(month => ({
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      name: month,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      revenue: 0,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      expenses: 0
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    }));
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const cashFlow = months.map(month => ({
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      name: month,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      inflow: 0,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      outflow: 0,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      net: 0
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    }));
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    const monthlySales = months.map(month => ({
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      name: month,
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      sales: 0
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    }));
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    // Process Journal Lines for Revenue vs Expenses and Cash Flow
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    journalEntries.forEach(entry => {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      const entryDate = new Date(entry.date);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      const monthName = entryDate.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'short' });
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      const monthIdx = months.indexOf(monthName);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      if (monthIdx !== -1) {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:        const lines = journalLines.filter(l => l.journalEntryId === entry.id);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:        lines.forEach(line => {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === line.accountId);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          if (!account) return;
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          if (account.type === 'Revenue') {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            revenueVsExpenses[monthIdx].revenue += (line.credit - line.debit);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          } else if (account.type === 'Expense') {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            revenueVsExpenses[monthIdx].expenses += (line.debit - line.credit);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          }
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          if (account.type === 'Asset' && (account.name.toLowerCase().includes('cash') || account.name.toLowerCase().includes('bank'))) {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            if (line.debit > 0) cashFlow[monthIdx].inflow += line.debit;
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            if (line.credit > 0) cashFlow[monthIdx].outflow += line.credit;
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            cashFlow[monthIdx].net += (line.debit - line.credit);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          }
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:        });
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    // Process Invoices for Monthly Sales
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    invoices.forEach(inv => {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      const invDate = new Date(inv.date);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      const monthName = invDate.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'short' });
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      const monthIdx = months.indexOf(monthName);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      if (monthIdx !== -1) {
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:        monthlySales[monthIdx].sales += inv.totalAmount;
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    return { revenueVsExpenses, cashFlow, monthlySales };
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  }, [journalEntries, journalLines, accounts, invoices]);
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  const metrics = [
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    { title: 'Total Revenue', amount: formatCurrency(stats.totalRevenue), icon: TrendingUp, color: 'text-emerald-500', bgColor: 'bg-emerald-500/10' },
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    { title: 'Total Expenses', amount: formatCurrency(stats.totalExpenses), icon: TrendingDown, color: 'text-rose-500', bgColor: 'bg-rose-500/10' },
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    { title: 'Net Profit', amount: formatCurrency(stats.netProfit), icon: DollarSign, color: 'text-[#00FFCC]', bgColor: 'bg-[#00FFCC]/10' },
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    { title: 'Cash Balance', amount: formatCurrency(stats.cashBalance), icon: Wallet, color: 'text-indigo-500', bgColor: 'bg-indigo-500/10' },
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    { title: 'Accounts Receivable', amount: formatCurrency(stats.accountsReceivable), icon: FileText, color: 'text-amber-500', bgColor: 'bg-amber-500/10' },
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    { title: 'Accounts Payable', amount: formatCurrency(stats.accountsPayable), icon: CreditCard, color: 'text-purple-500', bgColor: 'bg-purple-500/10' },
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  ];
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:  return (
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:    <AccountingLayout>
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:      <div className="space-y-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto pb-12">
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:          <div>
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            <h1 className={`text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight ${isDark ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-900'}`}>
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:              Financial Dashboard
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            </h1>
src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            <p className={`text-sm ${isDark ? 'text-[#B0B0C3]' : 'text-slate-500'}`}>

src/pages/accounting/Dashboard.tsx:            </p>

src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:export default function BalanceSheet() {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const { theme } = useTheme();
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const isDark = theme === 'dark';
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const { formatCurrency } = useSettings();
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const { accounts, journalEntries, journalLines } = useAccounting();
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const [asOfDate, setAsOfDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    assets: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    currentAssets: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    fixedAssets: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    liabilities: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    currentLiabilities: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    longTermLiabilities: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    equity: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    ownerCapital: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    retainedEarnings: true

src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const toggleSection = (section: string) => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    setExpandedSections(prev => ({ ...prev, [section]: !prev[section] }));
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  };
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  const report = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    // 1. Filter entries up to asOfDate
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const validEntries = journalEntries.filter(entry => entry.date <= asOfDate);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const validEntryIds = new Set(validEntries.map(e => e.id));
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const filteredLines = journalLines.filter(line => validEntryIds.has(line.journalEntryId));
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    // 2. Helper to get balance
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const getAccountBalance = (accountId: string, type: string) => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      if (!account) return 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      let debit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      let credit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      const lines = filteredLines.filter(l => l.accountId === accountId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      lines.forEach(line => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        debit += line.debit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        credit += line.credit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      });
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      const isDebitNormal = type === 'Asset' || type === 'Expense';
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      if (isDebitNormal) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        return (account.openingBalance || 0) + debit - credit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        return (account.openingBalance || 0) + credit - debit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    };
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    // 3. Categorize accounts
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const categorized = {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      assets: {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        current: [] as any[],
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        fixed: [] as any[],
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        total: 0
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      },
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      liabilities: {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        current: [] as any[],
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        longTerm: [] as any[],
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        total: 0
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      },
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      equity: {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        ownerCapital: [] as any[],
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        retainedEarnings: [] as any[],
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        total: 0
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    };
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    accounts.forEach(account => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      const balance = getAccountBalance(account.id, account.type);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      if (balance === 0 && account.openingBalance === 0) return;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      const accountWithBalance = { ...account, balance };
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      const code = parseInt(account.code);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      if (account.type === 'Asset') {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        if (code < 1500) categorized.assets.current.push(accountWithBalance);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        else categorized.assets.fixed.push(accountWithBalance);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        categorized.assets.total += balance;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      } else if (account.type === 'Liability') {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        if (code < 2500) categorized.liabilities.current.push(accountWithBalance);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        else categorized.liabilities.longTerm.push(accountWithBalance);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        categorized.liabilities.total += balance;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      } else if (account.type === 'Equity') {
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        if (code < 3500) categorized.equity.ownerCapital.push(accountWithBalance);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        else categorized.equity.retainedEarnings.push(accountWithBalance);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:        categorized.equity.total += balance;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    // 4. Calculate Net Income for Retained Earnings
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const revenues = accounts
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Revenue')
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      .reduce((sum, a) => sum + getAccountBalance(a.id, a.type), 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const expenses = accounts
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Expense')
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      .reduce((sum, a) => sum + getAccountBalance(a.id, a.type), 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const netIncome = revenues - expenses;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    // Add Net Income to Retained Earnings total
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const totalEquity = categorized.equity.total + netIncome;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    const totalLiabilitiesAndEquity = categorized.liabilities.total + totalEquity;
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    return { 
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      ...categorized, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      netIncome, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      totalEquity, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      totalLiabilitiesAndEquity,
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:      isBalanced: Math.abs(categorized.assets.total - totalLiabilitiesAndEquity) < 0.01
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:    };
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:  }, [accounts, journalEntries, journalLines, asOfDate]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/BalanceSheet.tsx:

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import AccountingLayout from '../../../components/accounting/AccountingLayout';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import { useTheme } from '../../../context/ThemeContext';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import { useAccounting } from '../../../context/AccountingContext';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import { useSettings } from '../../../context/SettingsContext';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import { Search, Download, FileText, AlertCircle, Calendar, Filter } from 'lucide-react';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import * as XLSX from 'xlsx';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import jsPDF from 'jspdf';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:import 'jspdf-autotable';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:export default function TrialBalance() {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const { theme } = useTheme();
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const isDark = theme === 'dark';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const { formatCurrency } = useSettings();
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const { accounts, journalLines, journalEntries } = useAccounting();
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState('');
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const trialBalance = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    // Map journal entries for quick date lookup
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    const entryDates = new Map(journalEntries.map(e => [e.id, e.date]));
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    const balances = accounts.map(account => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      let debit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      let credit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      // Calculate opening balance effect (everything before startDate)
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      if (startDate) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        const linesBefore = journalLines.filter(l => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:          if (l.accountId !== account.id) return false;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:          const date = entryDates.get(l.journalEntryId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:          return date && date < startDate;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        });
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        linesBefore.forEach(line => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:          debit += (line.debit || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:          credit += (line.credit || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        });
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      // Add account's initial opening balance
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      const isDebitNormal = account.type === 'Asset' || account.type === 'Expense';
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      if (isDebitNormal) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        debit += (account.openingBalance || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        credit += (account.openingBalance || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      // Calculate activity in range
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      const linesInRange = journalLines.filter(l => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        if (l.accountId !== account.id) return false;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        const date = entryDates.get(l.journalEntryId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        if (!date) return false;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        const afterStart = !startDate || date >= startDate;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        const beforeEnd = !endDate || date <= endDate;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        return afterStart && beforeEnd;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      });
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      linesInRange.forEach(line => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        debit += (line.debit || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        credit += (line.credit || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      });
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      // For a standard Trial Balance, we show the NET balance in either Debit or Credit
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      const netBalance = debit - credit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      return {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        ...account,
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        totalDebit: netBalance > 0 ? netBalance : 0,
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        totalCredit: netBalance < 0 ? Math.abs(netBalance) : 0,
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        rawDebit: debit, // Keep raw values if needed
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:        rawCredit: credit
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      };
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    }).filter(a => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      const matchesSearch = a.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || 
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:                           a.code.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      const hasBalance = a.totalDebit > 0 || a.totalCredit > 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      return matchesSearch && hasBalance;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    balances.sort((a, b) => a.code.localeCompare(b.code));
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    return balances;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  }, [accounts, journalLines, journalEntries, searchTerm, startDate, endDate]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const totalDebit = trialBalance.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.totalDebit, 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const totalCredit = trialBalance.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.totalCredit, 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const isBalanced = Math.abs(totalDebit - totalCredit) < 0.01;
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const exportToCSV = () => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    const data = trialBalance.map(a => ({
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      'Account Code': a.code,
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      'Account Name': a.name,
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      'Debit': a.totalDebit,
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      'Credit': a.totalCredit
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    }));
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    const ws = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(data);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, 'Trial Balance');
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    XLSX.writeFile(wb, `Trial_Balance_${endDate || 'all'}.xlsx`);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  };
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:  const exportToPDF = () => {

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    doc.setFontSize(18);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    doc.text('Trial Balance', 14, 22);
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    doc.setFontSize(11);

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    const tableData = trialBalance.map(a => [

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      a.name,

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:    (doc as any).autoTable({
src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      startY: 40,

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      foot: [['', 'Total', formatCurrency(totalDebit), formatCurrency(totalCredit)]],

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:      headStyles: { fillColor: [79, 70, 229] },

src/pages/accounting/reports/TrialBalance.tsx:

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:  
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:  const [selectedAccountId, setSelectedAccountId] = useState<string>('');

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:  const itemsPerPage = 20;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:  // Get all lines for the selected account
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:  const allAccountLines = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    if (!selectedAccountId) return [];
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    const lines = journalLines.filter(l => l.accountId === selectedAccountId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    const enrichedLines = lines.map(line => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      const entry = journalEntries.find(e => e.id === line.journalEntryId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      return {
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        ...line,
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        date: entry?.date || '',
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        reference: entry?.reference || '',
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        entryDescription: entry?.description || '',
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      };
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    // Sort by date then by ID for stability
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    return enrichedLines.sort((a, b) => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      const dateDiff = new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime();
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      if (dateDiff !== 0) return dateDiff;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      return a.id.localeCompare(b.id);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:  }, [selectedAccountId, journalLines, journalEntries]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    if (!selectedAccountId) return { filteredLines: [], openingBalance: 0, totalDebit: 0, totalCredit: 0, closingBalance: 0 };
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === selectedAccountId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    const baseOpeningBalance = account?.openingBalance || 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    let currentOpeningBalance = baseOpeningBalance;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    const periodLines: any[] = [];
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    let periodDebit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    let periodCredit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    allAccountLines.forEach(line => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      const lineDate = new Date(line.date);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      const isBeforeStart = startDate ? lineDate < new Date(startDate) : false;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      const isAfterEnd = endDate ? lineDate > new Date(endDate) : false;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      const matchesSearch = searchTerm 
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        ? line.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      if (isBeforeStart) {

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      } else if (!isAfterEnd && matchesSearch) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        periodLines.push(line);
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        periodDebit += line.debit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:        periodCredit += line.credit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      }

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    // Calculate running balance for the period lines

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    const linesWithBalance = periodLines.map(line => {

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      return { ...line, runningBalance: running };

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:      totalCredit: periodCredit,

src/pages/accounting/reports/GeneralLedger.tsx:    };

src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      // For P&L, we usually only look at activity within the period.
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      // However, some businesses include opening balances for the period.
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      // Standard P&L is activity-based.
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      const linesInRange = journalLines.filter(l => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        if (l.accountId !== accountId) return false;
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        const date = entryDates.get(l.journalEntryId);
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        if (!date) return false;
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        return date >= startDate && date <= endDate;
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      });
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      linesInRange.forEach(line => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        debit += (line.debit || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        credit += (line.credit || 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      });
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      // Revenue: Credit - Debit
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      // Expense: Debit - Credit
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      if (type === 'Revenue') {
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        return credit - debit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      } else if (type === 'Expense') {
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:        return debit - credit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      return 0;
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:    };
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:    const revenues = accounts
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Revenue')
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      .map(a => ({ ...a, balance: getAccountBalance(a.id, a.type) }))
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      .filter(a => a.balance !== 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:    const expenses = accounts
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      .filter(a => a.type === 'Expense')

src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:      .filter(a => a.balance !== 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:    const totalRevenue = revenues.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:    const totalExpense = expenses.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:    const netIncome = totalRevenue - totalExpense;
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/IncomeStatement.tsx:    return { revenues, expenses, totalRevenue, totalExpense, netIncome };

src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:export default function CashFlow() {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const { theme } = useTheme();
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const isDark = theme === 'dark';
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const { formatCurrency } = useSettings();
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const { accounts, journalEntries, journalLines } = useAccounting();
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), 0, 1).toISOString().split('T')[0]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    operating: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    investing: true,
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    financing: true
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  });
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const toggleSection = (section: string) => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    setExpandedSections(prev => ({ ...prev, [section]: !prev[section] }));
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  };
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const report = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    // 1. Identify Cash Accounts
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const cashAccounts = accounts.filter(a => 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      a.type === 'Asset' && 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      (a.name.toLowerCase().includes('cash') || a.name.toLowerCase().includes('bank'))
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    );
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const cashAccountIds = new Set(cashAccounts.map(a => a.id));
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    // 2. Calculate Opening Balance
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const preEntries = journalEntries.filter(e => e.date < startDate);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const preEntryIds = new Set(preEntries.map(e => e.id));
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const preLines = journalLines.filter(l => preEntryIds.has(l.journalEntryId) && cashAccountIds.has(l.accountId));
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    let openingBalance = cashAccounts.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.openingBalance || 0), 0);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    preLines.forEach(l => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      openingBalance += (l.debit - l.credit);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    // 3. Process Transactions in Range
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const rangeEntries = journalEntries.filter(e => e.date >= startDate && e.date <= endDate);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const rangeEntryIds = new Set(rangeEntries.map(e => e.id));
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const categories = {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      operating: { inflows: 0, outflows: 0, items: [] as any[] },
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      investing: { inflows: 0, outflows: 0, items: [] as any[] },
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      financing: { inflows: 0, outflows: 0, items: [] as any[] }
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    };
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    rangeEntries.forEach(entry => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      const entryLines = journalLines.filter(l => l.journalEntryId === entry.id);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      const cashLine = entryLines.find(l => cashAccountIds.has(l.accountId));
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      if (!cashLine) return;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      const amount = cashLine.debit - cashLine.credit;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      if (amount === 0) return;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      // Find the "other side" to categorize
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      const otherLine = entryLines.find(l => !cashAccountIds.has(l.accountId));
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      const otherAccount = otherLine ? accounts.find(a => a.id === otherLine.accountId) : null;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      let category: 'operating' | 'investing' | 'financing' = 'operating';
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      if (otherAccount) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        const code = parseInt(otherAccount.code);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        if (otherAccount.type === 'Revenue' || otherAccount.type === 'Expense') {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:          category = 'operating';
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        } else if (otherAccount.type === 'Asset' && code >= 1500) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:          category = 'investing';
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        } else if (otherAccount.type === 'Liability' && code >= 2500) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:          category = 'financing';
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        } else if (otherAccount.type === 'Equity') {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:          category = 'financing';
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        }
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      const item = {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        date: entry.date,
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        description: entry.description || cashLine.description,
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        amount: Math.abs(amount),
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        type: amount > 0 ? 'Inflow' : 'Outflow'
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      };
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      if (amount > 0) {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        categories[category].inflows += amount;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      } else {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:        categories[category].outflows += Math.abs(amount);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      }
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      categories[category].items.push(item);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    });
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const totalInflows = categories.operating.inflows + categories.investing.inflows + categories.financing.inflows;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const totalOutflows = categories.operating.outflows + categories.investing.outflows + categories.financing.outflows;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const netCashFlow = totalInflows - totalOutflows;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const closingBalance = openingBalance + netCashFlow;
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const chartData = [
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      { name: 'Operating', inflow: categories.operating.inflows, outflow: categories.operating.outflows },
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      { name: 'Investing', inflow: categories.investing.inflows, outflow: categories.investing.outflows },
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      { name: 'Financing', inflow: categories.financing.inflows, outflow: categories.financing.outflows }
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    ];
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    return { 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      openingBalance, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      categories, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      totalInflows, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      totalOutflows, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      netCashFlow, 
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      closingBalance,
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      chartData
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    };
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  }, [accounts, journalEntries, journalLines, startDate, endDate]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:  const exportToCSV = () => {
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    const data: any[] = [];
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    data.push(['Statement of Cash Flows', '', `${startDate} to ${endDate}`]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    data.push([]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    data.push(['Opening Cash Balance', '', report.openingBalance]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    data.push([]);
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:    ['operating', 'investing', 'financing'].forEach(cat => {

src/pages/accounting/reports/CashFlow.tsx:      report.categories[cat as keyof typeof report.categories].items.forEach(item => {

src/pages/accounting/Bills.tsx:      const tax = Number(newItems[index].tax);
src/pages/accounting/Bills.tsx:      newItems[index].total = (qty * price) + tax;
src/pages/accounting/Bills.tsx:    }
src/pages/accounting/Bills.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/Bills.tsx:    setItems(newItems);
src/pages/accounting/Bills.tsx:  };

src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  };
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  const handleRemoveLine = (index: number) => {
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    if (lines.length <= 2) return; // Minimum 2 lines
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    const newLines = [...lines];
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    newLines.splice(index, 1);
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    setLines(newLines);
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  };
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  const handleLineChange = (index: number, field: string, value: any) => {
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    const newLines = [...lines];
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    newLines[index] = { ...newLines[index], [field]: value };
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    // If setting debit, clear credit and vice versa to prevent both having values
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    if (field === 'debit' && value > 0) {
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:      newLines[index].credit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    } else if (field === 'credit' && value > 0) {
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:      newLines[index].debit = 0;
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    }
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:    setLines(newLines);
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  };
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  const totalDebit = lines.reduce((sum, line) => sum + (Number(line.debit) || 0), 0);
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  const totalCredit = lines.reduce((sum, line) => sum + (Number(line.credit) || 0), 0);
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:  const isBalanced = totalDebit === totalCredit && totalDebit > 0;
src/pages/accounting/JournalEntries.tsx:

src/pages/recruitment/Agreements.tsx:  const handleSave = () => {

src/pages/recruitment/SearchCandidate.tsx:        // Check if ranges overlap

src/pages/recruitment/SearchCandidate.tsx:                          <span className="bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded font-medium border border-slate-200">

src/pages/recruitment/SearchCandidate.tsx:                          </span>
src/pages/recruitment/SearchCandidate.tsx:                        )}

src/pages/recruitment/JobCandidates.tsx:        }
src/pages/recruitment/JobCandidates.tsx:      }

src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:      if (row.id === id) {

src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:        // Calculate amount
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:        if (field === 'quantity' || field === 'price' || field === 'discount') {
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:          const q = field === 'quantity' ? Number(value) : row.quantity;
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:          const p = field === 'price' ? Number(value) : row.price;
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:          const d = field === 'discount' ? Number(value) : row.discount;
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:          updatedRow.amount = q * p * (1 - d / 100);
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:        }
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:        return updatedRow;
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:      }
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:      return row;
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:    }));
src/pages/crm/Quotations.tsx:  };
